title: Connect Board Column to hyper-link to the Task (not the board)
excerpt:
Could the Connected Boards > Task actually link to the task, not just display information from that task.

posts.author: tonyw (tony w)
posts.cookedHtml:
Could the Connected Boards > Task actually link to the task, not just display information from that task.

Being able to change the status is very helpful, but in my case, I run a to-do list for a developer that links to a number of client project boards.
It would be useful for him to be able to click through and see the client board threads.
